title: Ṣoḍaśī / Tripurasundarī (Pañcadaśākṣarī) Sādhana
subcategory: Mahāvidyā (third) — full Śrī Vidyā form of the Goddess
description: The third of the Daśa Mahāvidyās and the principal Goddess-form of Śrī Vidyā, Ṣoḍaśī ("the Sixteen-Year-Old") is the full pañcadaśākṣarī (fifteen-syllable) form of Tripurasundarī / Lalitā — distinct from the bālā-pañcadaśī form covered in *bala-tripurasundari-sadhana.md*. Attested in the *Vāmakeśvara Tantra* (= *Nityāṣoḍaśikārṇava*), the *Bhāvanā Upaniṣad*, the *Paraśurāma Kalpasūtra*, and the *La
